meaning: adj.预兆的,恶兆的,不吉利的
examples: The hooting of an owl came over the hill--ominous sound!
IPBES chair Robert Watson says the "overwhelming evidence" presents an "ominous picture".
However, if the "click" of an opening door is part of an ominous action such as a burglary, the sound mixer may call attention to the "click" with an increase in volume.
"False Idols" draws from an ominous palette where danger and sensuality exist in equal measure.
As ominous as that sounds, Zastava does have a few things going for it.
